function.name: listPods
function.description: List pods in a Kubernetes namespace filtered by a label selector.

labelSelector.description: Label selector to filter pods (e.g., 'role=stable' or 'role=canary')

function.name: getLogs
function.description: Get recent logs for a specific pod.

function.name: getEvents
function.description: Get recent events in a Kubernetes namespace.

function.name: debugPod
function.description: Get debug information for a specific pod (status, conditions, container states).

namespace.description: The Kubernetes namespace of the pod

podName.description: The name of the pod to debug

function.name: getMetrics
function.description: Get CPU and memory metrics for a specific pod.

function.name: inspectResources
function.description: Inspect the deployments, services, and configmaps in a namespace.
